networkfirewall.loggingconfiguration.Fir.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the [AWS::NetworkFirewall::Firewall](aws-resource-networkfirewall-firewall.md) that the logging configuration is associated with. You can't change the firewall specification after you create the logging configuration.
The name of the firewall that the logging configuration is associated with. You can't change the firewall specification after you create the logging configuration.

networkfirewall.loggingconfiguration.Log.Description: Defines how AWS Network Firewall performs logging for a [AWS::NetworkFirewall::Firewall](aws-resource-networkfirewall-firewall.md).
